resources.string: Call screening is not set up yet.
This Android version does not support call screening apps.
Type or paste what the caller said, or paste a suspicious message. This is sent to the Prahari backend for a real check — no live call audio is used.
Please enter something to check first.
Could not reach the Prahari backend at %1$s. Make sure it is running and reachable, then try again.
Full-screen warnings for risky incoming calls

Rakshak AI needs permission to show full-screen warnings so they appear immediately — even when the phone is locked. Without this, a warning about a scam call might not be seen in time.\n\nThis is a one-time setup step, best done by a family member.
Waiting for permission… come back here after allowing it.
